sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18431" key="a)foli/dwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφολίδωτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n18431.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not sheathed in scales,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:4:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Porph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Abst.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
